excerpt: if a person spends the last hour without praying, his salvation is not possible
source_location_hint: on times of prayer and spiritual stations

excerpt: The gates of heaven are opened at the time of prayer
source_location_hint: on prayer times and divine mercy

excerpt: Eighteen angelic forms entrusted with conveying mercy; the Imam stands as guardian over both night and day
Muḥammad is ʿAlī, and ʿAlī is Muḥammad; exemplars of prayer times in various epochs
source_work: al-ʿAlim wa-l-Ghulām (attributed to Jaʿfar ibn Manṣūr al-Yamān)
source_location_hint: on cosmic cycles and prophetic stations

excerpt: The total of fifty-one rak'ahs corresponds to fifty-one Imams within seventy years; the forty-eighth Imam is Muḥammad ibn ʿAlī
source_location_hint: on numerical symbolism of prayer and Imamate
